title: Fix music bar viewport positioning and filter congress:false from roster

log.context: Fix music bar viewport positioning and filter congress:false from roster

Both changes are deployed:

**Change 1 — Music bar fixed to viewport bottom** (`congress.html` line 788): Added `position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;` to `#musicBar`. It will now always stick to the bottom of the viewport regardless of scroll position.
